title: Merge external website with current Mystic Moon site

requirements.text: Analyze the content and features from https://mysticmoonwithishita-2kv.caffeine.xyz/ and identify components, sections, or functionality that are not present in the current Mystic Moon with Ishita website

quotes: Merge this website and the website you created for me to make a business website with the name MysticMoonWithIshita.com

acceptanceCriteria: All unique content from the external website is identified
Differences between the two sites are documented
A merge plan is created that preserves all valuable content from both sites

requirements.text: Integrate any unique sections, features, or content from the external Mystic Moon website into the current site while maintaining the existing mystical visual theme with warm earth tones and celestial accents

quotes: Merge this website and the website you created for me to make a business website with the name MysticMoonWithIshita.com

acceptanceCriteria: All relevant content from both websites is present in the merged site
The existing mystical theme is preserved across all merged content
Navigation and user flow remains intuitive after merge
No duplicate content appears in the merged site

requirements.text: If the external website contains additional products, services, or business information not present in the current site, integrate them into the appropriate sections (product catalog, services list, or about section)

quotes: make a business website with the name MysticMoonWithIshita.com

acceptanceCriteria: Any additional products from the external site are added to the product catalog
New services are listed in appropriate sections
Business information is complete and consistent across all sections
Pricing system remains consistent with ₹500 base + ₹400 markup formula

requirements.text: Ensure the merged website presents a unified, professional business identity under the name MysticMoonWithIshita.com with consistent branding, messaging, and user experience throughout

quotes: make a business website with the name MysticMoonWithIshita.com

acceptanceCriteria: Brand name 'Mystic Moon with Ishita' is consistently displayed across all pages and sections
Visual design is cohesive throughout the merged site
Messaging tone and voice is consistent across all content
The site presents as a single, unified business rather than merged components

constraints: Preserve all existing features: Instagram link, About section, 35 customer reviews, product catalog, pricing system, and mystical visual theme
Maintain the existing single-actor backend architecture in backend/main.mo
Keep pricing calculation formula (₹500 base + ₹400 markup) consistent for all products
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, and components/ui directory
Render all product images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated directory
nonGoals: Changing the core technology stack (React, Motoko, Tailwind)
Implementing booking or appointment scheduling systems
Adding payment processing or e-commerce checkout functionality
Changing the established mystical visual theme colors and design
